situation: audit-2026-07-07-030 derived_fixes pending dispatch. FE-M-001: Vite dev server bound to 0.0.0.0 exposes trading API proxy to LAN. Worktree opt-frontend-1783366395 already contains prior FE-H-001/H-002/L-001/L-002/L-003 fixes (unmerged); cp-guard blocks re-copy from main, so direct wt edit + wt-internal commit per case-104 escape hatch.
action: Changed server.host from '0.0.0.0' to '127.0.0.1' in frontend/vite.config.ts. Updated inline comment to explain loopback binding closes both network-layer and Host-header attack vectors when combined with existing allowedHosts defense-in-depth. Committed directly in worktree (cp-guard diverged-wt escape hatch) and pushed to origin.
outcome_evidence: commit 6a6d809 on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395 pushed to origin (a0332f4..6a6d809). git diff shows host changed from '0.0.0.0' to '127.0.0.1' with updated comment. Code review URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/moni/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-frontend-1783366395
next_suggestion: Dispatch FE-M-002 (CSP meta tag in index.html) — but note worktree already has CSP headers in vite.config.ts; verify if index.html meta is still needed or if M-002 is substantively addressed
Dispatch FE-M-003 (remove localApiKey from persist partialize in aiStore.ts)
After all 7 FE-* fixes merged/rejected, set audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete to trigger next full audit

audit_findings.finding: FE-M-001: Vite dev server binds 0.0.0.0 without host check. LAN devices can reach dev server + proxied FastAPI trading endpoints via IP.
audit_findings.remediation: Bind to 127.0.0.1; keep allowedHosts as defense-in-depth. For remote debugging use SSH tunnel or explicit allowedHosts allowlist.
